DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF, LES DRANIC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT JOSEPH GALU HAS NOT FILED THE REQUISITE VERIFICATION TO THE RESPONSES PREVIOUSLY FILED ON HIS BEHALF. DEFENDANT JOWEPY GALU IS ORDER TO FIE HIS VERIFICATION WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 ARE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF WILL PREPARE AN APPROPRIATE ORDER, SUBMIT TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY TO THE COURT FOR SIGNING AT THE HEARING ON OCTOBER 24, 2016. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY
STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60631528)EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN FEES AND COSTS
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY GALU, JOSEPH, GALU, DOMINIC (TRANSACTION ID # 100016610)
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-05-2017 VACATED. DISMISSALS ON FILE. (206)

ATTY. DAVID S. GREENSEID, TEL. NO. 1-650-570-7878 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING: A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF, LES DRANIC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT JOSEPH GALU HAS NOT FILED THE REQUISITE VERIFICATION TO THE RESPONSES PREVIOUSLY FILED ON HIS BEHALF. DEFENDANT JOWEPY GALU IS ORDER TO FIE HIS VERIFICATION WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 ARE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF WILL PREPARE AN APPROPRIATE ORDER, SUBMIT TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY TO THE COURT FOR SIGNING AT THE HEARING ON OCTOBER 24, 2016. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/jpt
